## Goal

What can the learner or maintainer do after this PR that they could not do before?

## Scope

- [ ] Code change
- [ ] Content change
- [ ] QA/governance change
- [ ] Documentation only

## Metric / Coverage

- Implemented / target:
- Report or KPI affected:
- Expected user-visible result:
- Outcome metric required for Done:

## Evidence

- [ ] `npm run validate:strict`
- [ ] `npm run coverage:features:strict`
- [ ] Feature evidence gate passes for any promoted `Done` module
- [ ] `npm run quality:questions:strict`
- [ ] `npm run qa:questions:strict`
- [ ] `npm test -- --run`
- [ ] Browser/manual verification attached or described

## Rollback

How can this PR be disabled, reverted, or scoped down if it causes a regression?

## Manual QA

- [ ] Hebrew RTL checked
- [ ] Mobile layout checked when UI changed
- [ ] Question/content rows reviewed when content changed
- [ ] No `Math.random()` added
- [ ] No fake/demo/sample data added
